_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: In the Nf1 fl/fl ;DhhCre model each mouse develops 4–20 neurofibromas
details: Successfully generates neurofibroma model when combined with DhhCre, with each mouse developing 4-20 neurofibromas
